dataset.name: ERR091571 local-supported subset
dataset.workload: Public Illumina paired-end human WGS run; benchmarked here on a reproducible local subset of read 1.
dataset.benchmark_focus: Track public-dataset provenance while generating a local-supported comparison artifact without requiring the full 35GB download in every validation loop.
notes: The tracked benchmark artifact uses the first 2,000 records streamed from the public ERR091571 read 1 FASTQ so the evidence chain stays public and reproducible while still completing in the local closeout validation loop.

Read 2 is prepared alongside read 1 to preserve paired-end provenance, but the current tracked local-supported comparison uses the read 1 subset as a single-input workload because generic compressors do not consume paired FASTQ pairs directly.

A larger 20,000-record streamable subset is also prepared for exploratory benchmarking, but the tracked local-supported artifact is currently pinned to 2,000 records because the current fq-compressor build regresses sharply beyond that size on this workload.

benchmark_command.invocation: ./scripts/benchmark.sh --dataset err091571-local-supported --prepare-only && ./scripts/build.sh clang-release && python3 benchmark/benchmark.py --dataset err091571-local-supported --tools fqc,gzip,xz,bzip2,spring --threads 1 --runs 1 --json benchmark/results/err091571-local-supported.json --report benchmark/results/err091571-local-supported.md

deferred_tools.name: Spring
deferred_tools.reason: Configured as a target peer but deferred until the local Spring toolchain is integrated and validated.

fqc.name: fq-compressor
fqc.description: High-performance FASTQ compressor with ABC algorithm
fqc.scope_note: Primary project binary; included in every local benchmark run.

spring.name: Spring
spring.scope_note: Configured as a target peer but deferred until the local Spring toolchain is integrated and validated.

gzip.name: gzip
gzip.scope_note: Included in the supported local comparison set.

xz.name: xz
xz.scope_note: Included in the supported local comparison set.

bzip2.name: bzip2
bzip2.version: bzip2, a block-sorting file compressor.  Version 1.0.8, 13-Jul-2019.
bzip2.scope_note: Included in the supported local comparison set.

compression_ratio.conclusion: fq-compressor is not leading for compression ratio in the measured set; bzip2 is best at 0.2509 compressed/original.

compression_speed.conclusion: fq-compressor is not leading for compression speed in the measured set; bzip2 is best at 8.3 MB/s.

decompression_speed.conclusion: fq-compressor is not leading for decompression speed in the measured set; gzip is best at 55.7 MB/s output.

deferred_tools.name: Spring
deferred_tools.reason: Configured as a target peer but deferred until the local Spring toolchain is integrated and validated.

scope.note: Specialized peers listed as deferred or unavailable are outside the verified comparison scope for this tracked result set.
